summary: Double-Counting Bug Fix Testing - 100% PASS. All 13 backend tests passed verifying the fix for Day Start cash calculation double-counting. Key fixes verified: 1) paymentMode (CASH/CREDIT) set at order creation and NEVER changes, 2) Cash Sales = SUM(total) from CASH mode orders only, 3) Toggle only updates paymentStatus/dueAmount (NOT paidAmount or paymentMode), 4) No synthetic PAY-TOGGLE payments created, 5) Customer Receipts excludes PAY-TOGGLE-* payments.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: paymentMode ENUM added to order model (line 60-63 in order.js) with CASH/CREDIT values
VERIFIED: createOrder sets paymentMode based on paidAmount - CREDIT if paidAmount=0 or partial, CASH if paidAmount>=total (lines 41-50 in controller/order.js)
VERIFIED: togglePaymentStatus does NOT modify paymentMode or paidAmount (lines 757-765 in controller/order.js) - only updates paymentStatus and dueAmount
VERIFIED: No PAY-TOGGLE payment created in togglePaymentStatus - comment at lines 823-825 explicitly states this
VERIFIED: getRealTimeSummary uses paymentMode='CASH' for Cash Sales calculation (line 387 in dailySummary.js)
VERIFIED: Customer Receipts exclude PAY-TOGGLE-* payments (lines 416-418 in dailySummary.js)
VERIFIED: getExpectedCashInDrawer in telegramAlert.js uses same logic - CASH orders for cashSales (lines 175-176)
VERIFIED: Auto-migration adds paymentMode column with backfill for existing paid orders (lines 52-66 in index.js)
VERIFIED: Audit log for toggle includes paymentMode in oldValues/newValues and description (lines 880-892 in controller/order.js)
seed_data_creation: Created 13 test orders during test execution with prefixes: TEST_Credit_, TEST_Cash_, TEST_Partial_, TEST_Toggle_, TEST_NoPayToggle, TEST_CashSales_, TEST_ToggleCashSales, TEST_DoubleCount, TEST_AuditPaymentMode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Double-counting bug fix verified working. paymentMode (CASH/CREDIT) is set at order creation based on paidAmount and NEVER changes afterward. Toggle only updates paymentStatus and dueAmount. Day Start Cash formula: Expected Cash = Opening Balance + Cash Sales (CASH orders only) + Customer Receipts (excl PAY-TOGGLE) - Supplier Payments - Expenses. No PAY-TOGGLE payments are created by current code. Backfill migration updates existing paid orders to CASH mode.

PASSED: POST /api/orders with partial payment sets paymentMode='CREDIT'
PATCH /api/orders/:id/payment-status toggle to paid does NOT change paymentMode
PATCH /api/orders/:id/payment-status toggle to paid does NOT change paidAmount
PATCH /api/orders/:id/payment-status toggle to paid sets dueAmount=0
PATCH /api/orders/:id/payment-status toggle does NOT create PAY-TOGGLE payment
GET /api/dashboard/summary/realtime/:date - Cash Sales only counts CASH mode orders
GET /api/dashboard/summary/realtime/:date - Credit order toggled to paid does NOT increase Cash Sales
GET /api/dashboard/summary/realtime/:date - Customer Receipts field present (excludes PAY-TOGGLE per code review)
Double-count scenario: Credit order + toggle = Cash Sales unchanged
Backfill: Test orders correctly have CASH/CREDIT paymentMode
Audit log includes paymentMode in toggle description and values

bug_fix_details.root_cause: When toggling a credit sale to 'paid', the old code was adding the order total to Cash Sales AND also counting any Customer Receipt separately - resulting in double-counting the same money
fix_implemented: Added paymentMode (CASH/CREDIT) enum to orders table - set at creation, immutable afterward
CASH = paid at POS (paidAmount >= total at creation)
CREDIT = unpaid or partial at creation
Cash Sales now calculated from paymentMode='CASH' orders only, not from paidAmount
Toggle only changes paymentStatus and dueAmount, NOT paidAmount or paymentMode
No synthetic PAY-TOGGLE payments created - toggle is purely a status marker
Customer Receipts in summary excludes any legacy PAY-TOGGLE-* payment records
bug_fix_details.formula: Expected Cash = Opening Balance + Cash Sales (CASH orders) + Customer Receipts - Supplier Payments - Expenses
